articles.title: Toronto Stocks Enjoy Broad Gains After New Pipeline Proposal

articles.title: Canada, Philippines Agree to Sign Trade Deal This Year, Grow Defense Ties

articles.title: Copper Tracks Dollar Swings as Traders Weigh US Rate Outlook
articles.summary: Copper rose on Friday, tracking small swings in the US dollar as investors continue to assess the outlook for US monetary policy.

articles.title: Oil Is Little Changed as Persian Gulf Flows Near Pre-War Levels
articles.summary: Oil prices were little changed in thin trading as the recovery of Persian Gulf flows fomented a new surplus in key parts of the global market.

articles.title: Gold Heads for First Weekly Gain Since May on Easing Fed Outlook
articles.summary: Gold headed for its first weekly gain since May as traders dialed down their expectations of Federal Reserve rate hikes.

articles.title: CPP Invests $1.75 Billion in EQT’s AI Buildout
articles.summary: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board will invest $1.75 billion to support EQT AB’s artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout, it announced Friday.

articles.title: SQM-Codelco Venture Maps Path to Higher Lithium Output in Chile
articles.summary: Chilean mining companies SQM and Codelco are paving the way to boost output at their sprawling lithium partnership by more than 70%, in a long-term bet on battery demand.

articles.title: ECB’s Lagarde Will Attend Next Week’s Ecofin Instead of Vujcic
articles.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde will be attending next week’s meeting of European Union finance ministers in Brussels instead of her vice president.

articles.title: ECB’s Nagel Stresses Need for Vigilance at Next Rate Decision
articles.summary: The European Central Bank should stay watchful for inflation risks and keep its options open, Governing Council member Joachim Nagel said.

articles.title: European Stocks at Record, Book Fourth Straight Week of Gains
articles.summary: European stocks advanced on Friday, closing at a record high and recording a fourth straight week of gains as investors remained optimistic that the Federal Reserve will hold off on rate hikes for now
